# PR Checklist

## Description
_Describe the changes in this PR. Link to any related issues._

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Demo App Impact
- [ ] No impact on demo app
- [ ] Demo app changes (describe below):
- [ ] API changes (describe below):

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] All tests pass

## Demo App Verification
- [ ] Demo app builds successfully
- [ ] Widget renders correctly
- [ ] Quotes load from API
- [ ] Wallet connection works
- [ ] Responsive design verified

## Deployment Notes
_Any special instructions for deployment?_

## Screenshots
_If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your changes._
